instruction:
You are an Expert DevOps Engineer specializing in Travis CI to GitHub Actions migrations. Migrate this Travis CI config to a COMPLETE GitHub Actions workflow.

OUTPUT RULES
- Output YAML only (no prose). Your output MUST start with "name:" and include top-level keys: name, on, jobs.
- Include at least one job with: runs-on, steps.
- Do NOT output a snippet (must not start with "- uses:" or "- run:").

CONVERSION RULES
- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.
- Map Travis lifecycle to GHA steps: before_install, install, before_script, script, after_success/failure, deploy.
- Map matrices: jdk/node_js/python/go -> strategy.matrix; allow_failures -> continue-on-error.
- Env: env.global -> env (workflow/job/step). $FOO secrets -> ${{ secrets.FOO }}.
- Caches: cache: directories -> actions/cache@v4 with stable keys.
- Services/addons: services (dbs) -> jobs.<job>.services; addons.apt -> apt-get steps.
- Docker/Compose: preserve docker build/push and docker-compose up/down; keep wait loops verbatim.
- Triggers: preserve original branch/tag names; do not invent "main" or "master".
- Use modern actions: actions/checkout@v4; actions/setup-java@v4 (distribution: temurin), setup-node@v4, setup-python@v5, setup-go@v5.
- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source (Buildx, login actions, GHCR, Sonar, custom email actions). If no 1:1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:" comment.
- Prefer compact flow style for simple event lists. Use on: [push, pull_request] instead of multiline empty mappings.
- Do not leave empty event mappings.
- If branch/tag filters are required, switch to the expanded form for that event only.


Now migrate below input section Travis CI configuration to equivalent complete GitHub Actions workflow and return ONLY the complete migrated YAML maintaining the above OUTPUT and CONVERSION rules.
input:
dist: xenial
language: minimal

services:
- docker

install:
- ci/build-docker-image

script:
- ci/docker-build-game
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build Docker image
        run: ci/build-docker-image
      - name: Build game in Docker
        run: ci/docker-build-game

input:
language: java
sudo: false # faster builds

jdk:
  - openjdk11
  - openjdk8

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2

install: true

script:
  - rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/org/glassfish/javax.el/3.0.1-b08
  - travis_wait 30 ./mvnw --batch-mode --no-transfer-progress clean install -DskipTests=false -DskipIntegrationTests=false -Dcheckstyle.skip=false -Drat.skip=false -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

after_failure:
  - echo "build failed!"
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['11', '8']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Clean specific Maven artifact
        run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/org/glassfish/javax.el/3.0.1-b08
      - name: Build and test
        run: ./mvnw --batch-mode --no-transfer-progress clean install -DskipTests=false -DskipIntegrationTests=false -Dcheckstyle.skip=false -Drat.skip=false -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true
        timeout-minutes: 30
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        if: success()
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
      - name: Build failed
        if: failure()
        run: echo "build failed!"

input:
before_cache:
  - find "${HOME}"/.ivy2/cache -name "ivydata-*.properties" -print -delete
cache:
  directories:
    - ${HOME}/.ivy2/cache

env:
  - RUNNER_IMAGE="constellationapplication/netbeans-runner:11.3"

git:
  depth: false

jobs:
  include:
  - stage: Build and Test
    dist: bionic
    language: java
    services:
      - docker
    script:
      - docker pull "${RUNNER_IMAGE}"
      - docker run --mount "type=bind,source=${TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR},target=${TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR}" --mount "type=bind,source=${HOME}/.ivy2/cache,target=/root/.ivy2/cache" --workdir "${TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR}" "${RUNNER_IMAGE}" .travis/run-tests.sh
      - .travis/sonar.sh
    addons:
      sonarcloud:
        organization: "constellation-app"
        token: $SONAR_TOKEN

deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key:
    secure: 
  file: 'dist/constellation.zip'
  on:
    repo: constellation-app/constellation
    branch: master
    tags: true

notifications:
  webhooks:
    urls:
      - https://webhooks.gitter.im/e/82ac70bdb3f9e144d859
    on_success: change
    on_failure: always
    on_start: never
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  RUNNER_IMAGE: constellationapplication/netbeans-runner:11.3

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Ivy packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.ivy2/cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-ivy-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-ivy-
      - name: Pull Docker image
        run: docker pull "${RUNNER_IMAGE}"
      - name: Run tests in Docker
        run: docker run --mount "type=bind,source=${GITHUB_WORKSPACE},target=${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}" --mount "type=bind,source=${HOME}/.ivy2/cache,target=/root/.ivy2/cache" --workdir "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}" "${RUNNER_IMAGE}" .travis/run-tests.sh
      - name: Run SonarCloud analysis
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: .travis/sonar.sh
      - name: Cleanup Ivy cache
        if: always()
        run: find "${HOME}"/.ivy2/cache -name "ivydata-*.properties" -print -delete

  deploy:
    needs: build-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.repository == 'constellation-app/constellation' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Releases
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          gh release upload ${{ github.ref_name }} dist/constellation.zip
      - name: Send Gitter notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          # TODO: Configure Gitter webhook notification to https://webhooks.gitter.im/e/82ac70bdb3f9e144d859
          echo "Gitter notification not implemented"

input:
language: java
jdk:
  - openjdk8
cache:
  directories:
    - "$HOME/.m2/repository"
before_cache:
  - rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/org/joda/time
install:
  - mvn --version
script:
  - mvn install site -e -B
after_success:
  - if [[ $TRAVIS_TAG =~ ^website.*$ ]] && [ "$TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION" == "oraclejdk8" ]; then chmod +x ./.github/website.sh; .github/website.sh; fi
  - if [[ $TRAVIS_TAG =~ ^v.*$ ]] && [ "$TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST" == "false" ] && [ "$TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION" == "oraclejdk8" ]; then chmod +x ./.github/website.sh; .github/website.sh; fi
env:
  global:
    secure: UK9A4eHPOP6XkYbST1kpv3gVEZTBqp79eCF0nqpXejbXihY58MNVZ0aGt8IM/ZThO/UoK+AxWjaSLljE2Neo4ehxvRHsRG0bIhAoCBUjP6f6vuMYTZlRNb9W+NM3RjXvrQGnCM3PTckWaFQ6i5Ny4e1GuETSdh96Yk7WNn6DMJM=
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache Maven repository
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2/repository
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}

    - name: Install
      run: mvn --version

    - name: Build
      run: mvn install site -e -B

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/org/joda/time

    - name: Website script on website tags
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/website')
      run: |
        chmod +x ./.github/website.sh
        ./.github/website.sh

    - name: Website script on release tags
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && github.event_name == 'push'
      run: |
        chmod +x ./.github/website.sh
        ./.github/website.sh

input:
language: java
jdk:
  - openjdk7 # not really openjdk7 - we're just using this travis placeholder for our own Oracle JDK 7 installation
  - oraclejdk8
  - oraclejdk9
  - openjdk10

before_install:
  - echo "TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION is ${TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION}"
  - |
    if [[ "${TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION}" == "openjdk7" ]]; then
      
      export MAVEN_OPTS="-Dhttps.protocols=TLSv1.2 -Xmx512m -XX:MaxPermSize=128m"
      export JAVA_HOME="/usr/lib/jvm/java-7-oracle" # Set JAVA_HOME to where we want to install Oracle JDK 7
      export PATH="${JAVA_HOME}/bin:${PATH}"
      
      if [[ ! -d "${JAVA_HOME}" ]]; then
        # Download and install Oracle JDK 7:
        wget https://s3.amazonaws.com/d2fbee19-5fe2-425f-ae11-cd25b35dc99a/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz
        tar xvfz /tmp/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz -C /tmp
        sudo mv /tmp/jdk1.7.0_80 "${JAVA_HOME}"
      fi
      
      # Download and install JCE Unlimited Strength Crypto policies for Oracle JDK 7:
      curl -q -L -C - https://238dj3282as03k369.s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip -o /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip
      sudo unzip -oj -d "$JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security" /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip \*/\*.jar
      rm /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip
    fi
  # If on JDK 8, ensure build coverage assertions are run (we only need to run this on one JDK to reduce overall build times):
  - export BUILD_COVERAGE="$([ $TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION == 'oraclejdk8' ] && echo 'true')"

install: true

script:
  - mvn install
  - test -z "$BUILD_COVERAGE" || { mvn clean clover:setup test && mvn -pl . clover:clover clover:check coveralls:report; }
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: [openjdk7, oraclejdk8, oraclejdk9, openjdk10]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Echo JDK version
      run: echo "TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION is ${{ matrix.jdk }}"

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      if: matrix.jdk == 'oraclejdk8'
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Set up JDK 9
      if: matrix.jdk == 'oraclejdk9'
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '9'

    - name: Set up JDK 10
      if: matrix.jdk == 'openjdk10'
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '10'

    - name: Install Oracle JDK 7
      if: matrix.jdk == 'openjdk7'
      run: |
        export MAVEN_OPTS="-Dhttps.protocols=TLSv1.2 -Xmx512m -XX:MaxPermSize=128m"
        export JAVA_HOME="/usr/lib/jvm/java-7-oracle"
        export PATH="${JAVA_HOME}/bin:${PATH}"
        if [[ ! -d "${JAVA_HOME}" ]]; then
          wget https://s3.amazonaws.com/d2fbee19-5fe2-425f-ae11-cd25b35dc99a/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz
          tar xvfz /tmp/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz -C /tmp
          sudo mv /tmp/jdk1.7.0_80 "${JAVA_HOME}"
        fi
        curl -q -L -C - https://238dj3282as03k369.s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip -o /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip
        sudo unzip -oj -d "$JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security" /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip \*/\*.jar
        rm /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip

    - name: Install
      run: /bin/true

    - name: Build
      run: mvn install

    - name: Coverage
      if: matrix.jdk == 'oraclejdk8'
      run: |
        mvn clean clover:setup test
        mvn -pl . clover:clover clover:check coveralls:report

input:
sudo: required
dist: xenial
language: java
jdk:
    - openjdk8
    - openjdk11
env:
    - RUNTIME=ol RUNTIME_VERSION=19.0.0.6
    - RUNTIME=ol RUNTIME_VERSION=19.0.0.3
    - RUNTIME=wlp RUNTIME_VERSION=19.0.0.6
    - RUNTIME=wlp RUNTIME_VERSION=19.0.0.3
cache:
    directories:
        - $HOME/.m2
before_install:
    - echo "Deleting old .m2 artifacts..."
    - rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/net/wasdev
    - rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/openliberty
    # - echo 'Installing ci.ant lib...'
    # - git clone https://github.com/OpenLiberty/ci.ant.git ./ci.ant
    # - cd ./ci.ant
    # - mvn clean install
    # - cd ..
    - echo 'Installing ci.common lib...'
    - git clone https://github.com/OpenLiberty/ci.common.git ./ci.common
    - cd ./ci.common
    - mvn clean install
    - cd ..
script:
    - travis_wait 30 mvn verify -Ponline-its -Dinvoker.streamLogs=true -Druntime=$RUNTIME -DruntimeVersion=$RUNTIME_VERSION
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - java-version: 8
            RUNTIME: ol
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.6
          - java-version: 8
            RUNTIME: ol
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.3
          - java-version: 8
            RUNTIME: wlp
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.6
          - java-version: 8
            RUNTIME: wlp
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.3
          - java-version: 11
            RUNTIME: ol
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.6
          - java-version: 11
            RUNTIME: ol
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.3
          - java-version: 11
            RUNTIME: wlp
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.6
          - java-version: 11
            RUNTIME: wlp
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.3

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: ${{ matrix.java-version }}

    - name: Cache Maven repository
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-

    - name: Before install
      run: |
        echo "Deleting old .m2 artifacts..."
        rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/net/wasdev
        rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/openliberty
        echo 'Installing ci.common lib...'
        git clone https://github.com/OpenLiberty/ci.common.git ./ci.common
        cd ./ci.common
        mvn clean install
        cd ..

    - name: Build
      run: mvn verify -Ponline-its -Dinvoker.streamLogs=true -Druntime=${{ matrix.RUNTIME }} -DruntimeVersion=${{ matrix.RUNTIME_VERSION }}

input:
language: generic

dist: bionic

script:
   # Install dependencies
  - pwd
  - ls
  - sudo apt-get update
  - sudo apt-get install sqlite3
  - echo $JAVA_HOME
  # Install PROJ
  - wget https://download.osgeo.org/proj/proj-6.2.1.tar.gz
  - tar xf proj-6.2.1.tar.gz
  - cd proj-6.2.1
  - ./configure
  - NPROC=$(nproc)
  - make -j${NPROC}
  - sudo make install
  # build PROJ-JNI
  - cd ..
  - mvn package
  - ls
  # tests
  - java --class-path target/proj-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar example/TransformPoints.java
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Check environment
        run: |
          pwd
          ls
          echo $JAVA_HOME
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install sqlite3
      - name: Download PROJ
        run: wget https://download.osgeo.org/proj/proj-6.2.1.tar.gz
      - name: Extract and build PROJ
        run: |
          tar xf proj-6.2.1.tar.gz
          cd proj-6.2.1
          ./configure
          NPROC=$(nproc)
          make -j${NPROC}
          sudo make install
      - name: Build PROJ-JNI
        run: |
          mvn package
          ls
      - name: Run tests
        run: java --class-path target/proj-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar example/TransformPoints.java

language: java
sudo: required

services:
  - docker

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "twasi"

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: tests
      script:
        - "mvn jacoco:prepare-agent surefire:test jacoco:report sonar:sonar"
    - stage: build
      script:
        - "mvn clean compile assembly:single"
    - stage: deploy-docker-dev
      script:
        - "cp .travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml && mvn clean compile assembly:single docker:build -DpushImage"
    - stage: deploy-dev
      script:
        - "sed -i \"s/LIVE/${TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER}/g\" pom.xml"
        - "cp .travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml && mvn clean compile assembly:single deploy"

  - name: deploy-dev

name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Run tests and SonarQube analysis
        run: mvn jacoco:prepare-agent surefire:test jacoco:report sonar:sonar
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
          SONAR_ORGANIZATION: twasi

  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Build
        run: mvn clean compile assembly:single

  deploy-docker-dev:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/dev'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Build and push Docker image
        run: |
          cp .travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
          mvn clean compile assembly:single docker:build -DpushImage

  deploy-dev:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/dev'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Update version
        run: sed -i "s/LIVE/${{ github.run_number }}/g" pom.xml
      - name: Deploy
        run: |
          cp .travis.settings.xml $HOME/.m2/settings.xml
          mvn clean compile assembly:single deploy

      - master
      - '[0-9]+.[0-9]+'

jobs:
  test-oraclejdk8:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Build and verify
        run: mvn -q clean verify -B

  test-openjdk11:
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Build and verify
        run: mvn -q clean verify -B

  deploy:
    needs: [test-oraclejdk8, test-openjdk11]
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Deploy to Sonatype snapshots
        run: bash .travis.deploy.artifacts.sh
      - name: Email notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          # TODO: Configure email notifications to vertx3-ci@googlegroups.com
